review: The headphones are comfortable and the noise cancellation is excellent.
Battery died after three days. Very disappointed with the quality.
Sound is okay for the price but the case feels cheap.
Fast shipping and the packaging was secure. Product works as described.
One port stopped working within a week. Support never replied to my email.
The laptop is lightweight and the screen is bright. Great for travel.
Fan is loud under load and it gets hot during video calls.
Keyboard feels premium and battery easily lasts a full workday.
Arrived with a dent on the corner. Returning it tomorrow.
Average phone camera. Fine for everyday use but not for photography.
